sensitivity.name: Mic Sens. [x]
sensitivity.desc: Multiplies incoming audio energy. Higher values make the visualizer more reactive to quiet music.

trendRate.name: Trend Rate
trendRate.desc: Determines how fast the "Energy Trend" (0-1) updates. Low values create a smooth long-term average.

clearOpacity.name: Trail Persistence
clearOpacity.desc: Controls how much of the previous frame remains. 0 = Permanent trails, 1 = No trails.

waveCount.name: Emanation Rings
waveCount.desc: Number of circular waves expanding from the center.

waveSpeed.name: Wave Velocity
waveSpeed.desc: The speed at which rings expand. Negative values make rings collapse inward.

waveThickness.name: Stroke Width [px]
waveThickness.desc: Thickness of the circular wave outlines.

waveChaos.name: Distortion Field
waveChaos.desc: Adds Perlin-like noise distortion to the wave perimeter for an organic, liquid look.

waveOpacity.name: Global Opacity
waveOpacity.desc: Alpha transparency for the entire wave layer.

rayCount.name: Laser Beams
rayCount.desc: Number of light rays emanating from the center point.

raySpeed.name: Tunnel Rotation
raySpeed.desc: Rotation speed of the beam array.

rayThickness.name: Beam Width
rayThickness.desc: Width of each individual light ray.

rayCenterHole.name: Void Radius
rayCenterHole.desc: Creates a black circular "Eye" in the center where no rays are drawn.

rayChaos.name: Jitter Distortion
rayChaos.desc: Adds aggressive jitter to the beam position for a glitched, strobe-like effect.

rayOpacity.name: Optical Weight
rayOpacity.desc: Alpha transparency for the laser beams.

imgScale.name: Base Scale [x]
imgScale.desc: The zoom level of the background media. Values > 1 ensure Mediterranean artifacts fill the screen.

imgGlitch.name: Glitch Intensity
imgGlitch.desc: Randomized X/Y offset applied to the image based on music energy.

imgBlur.name: Optical Blur [px]
imgBlur.desc: Real-time gaussian-style blur applied to the media pool.

imgSaturate.name: Saturation [%]
imgSaturate.desc: Deepens or washes out colors. 100% is natural, 0% is B&W.

photoRotation.name: Tilt Axis [rad]
photoRotation.desc: Slow rotation of the background media for a floating sensation.

photoContrast.name: Contrast Mod [%]
photoContrast.desc: Digital contrast boost. High values (>200) create a high-fashion, high-energy look.

particleChaos.name: Brownian Force
particleChaos.desc: Random force applied to particle movement.

particleColorSpeed.name: Hue Pulse
particleColorSpeed.desc: Speed at which particles cycle through the palette colors.

particleRotation.name: Geometry Spin
particleRotation.desc: Rotation of shapes like squares and triangles.

particleGravity.name: Gravity Y-Pull
particleGravity.desc: Simulates weight pulling particles up or down.

particleWind.name: Atmospheric Wind
particleWind.desc: A global force that causes all particles to drift collectively. Best mapped to overall song energy.

particleBreezeStrength.name: Organic Breeze
particleBreezeStrength.desc: The intensity of the collective rhythmic swaying of particles.

textScale.name: Typography Zoom [x]
textScale.desc: Size multiplier for the lyric text.

textBlur.name: Atmosphere Fog [px]
textBlur.desc: Blur applied to text for a cinematic, hazy glow.

textHoldTime.name: Text Duration [s]
textHoldTime.desc: How long each word stays on screen.

textTypeSpeed.name: Typewriter Speed
textTypeSpeed.desc: Milliseconds delay between characters for the nostalgic typewriter effect.

textEnvironmentDrift.name: Atmospheric Breeze
textEnvironmentDrift.desc: How much the text sways in the collective rhythmic drift.

textInkResolve.name: Ink Resolve Speed
textInkResolve.desc: How quickly the text "soaks" into existence during its resolve animation.

analogDrift.name: RGB Ghosting [px]
analogDrift.desc: Offsets Color Channels for a nostalgic double-vision effect.

analogScanlines.name: CRT Scanlines
analogScanlines.desc: Simulates old TV hardware by drawing horizontal bars across the entire image.

analogNoise.name: Film Grain
analogNoise.desc: Adds digital noise for a cinematic, film-like texture.

analogWarmth.name: Mediterranean Glow
analogWarmth.desc: Applies a sunset-inspired warm color wash specifically tailored for Agost projections.

analogLightLeak.name: Sun Flare Leaks
analogLightLeak.desc: Simulates light leaking into a film camera lens.

analogVignette.name: Vignette Darkening
analogVignette.desc: Darkens the corners of the screen to draw focus to the center.

opticsFocusPull.name: Depth of Field
opticsFocusPull.desc: Gaussian blur simulating camera bokeh. Blurry during quiet ambiance, snaps sharp during loud hits.

analogInkBleed.name: Ink Spread Speed
analogInkBleed.desc: Controls how fast ink spreads across the fibers. High values create a "soaked" watercolor look.

analogPaperGrain.name: Paper Fiber Detail
analogPaperGrain.desc: Intensifies the procedural paper texture detail.

analogStainIntensity.name: Vintage Stains
analogStainIntensity.desc: Adds subtle organic coffee/ink stains to the paper corners.

webglSpeed.name: Grid Speed
webglSpeed.desc: Forward scrolling speed of the 3D Cyber Grid.

webglElevation.name: Floor Elevation
webglElevation.desc: Camera height above the infinite 3D plane.

webglGlow.name: Grid Glow
webglGlow.desc: Intensity and thickness of the neon grid lines.

webglDistortion.name: Bass Distortion
webglDistortion.desc: How violently the grid bumps and warps to the audio.

panotScale.name: Panot Tiling
panotScale.desc: The number of flower tiles across the screen.

panotBloom.name: Panot Bloom
panotBloom.desc: Music-reactive light pulsing and sizing of the flower petals.

panotMortar.name: Panot Mortar
panotMortar.desc: Thickness of the grout lines between tiles.

panotShadow.name: Panot Depth
panotShadow.desc: 3D shadow depth for an embossed stone look.

horizonSpeed.name: Horizon Scroll
horizonSpeed.desc: Speed at which the background landscape drifts by.

gpuAberration.name: Chromatic Warp
gpuAberration.desc: Splits R, G, B channels radially outwards.

gpuSmearRatio.name: Fluid Density
gpuSmearRatio.desc: Amount of previous frames left on screen. 0 is none, 0.99 is infinite smearing trails.

gpuMeltSpeed.name: Gravity Drip
gpuMeltSpeed.desc: Pulls the smeared pixels downwards like dripping paint. Negative values drift up.

gpuKaleidoSegments.name: Kaleidoscope Slices
gpuKaleidoSegments.desc: Folds the screen geometry into Polar mirrored segments.

imgOpacity.name: Global Opacity
imgOpacity.desc: Transparency of the background media pool.

sensitivity.desc: Multiplies incoming audio energy. Higher values make the visualizer more reactive to quiet music.

waveChaos.name: Distortion Field
waveChaos.desc: Adds Perlin-like noise distortion to the wave perimeter for an organic, liquid look.

waveOpacity.name: Global Opacity
waveOpacity.desc: Alpha transparency for the entire wave layer.

imgScale.desc: The zoom level of the background media. Values > 1 ensure Mediterranean artifacts fill the screen.

imgGlitch.name: Glitch Intensity
imgGlitch.desc: Randomized X/Y offset applied to the image based on music energy.

imgBlur.name: Optical Blur [px]
imgBlur.desc: Real-time gaussian-style blur applied to the media pool.

imgSaturate.name: Saturation [%]
imgSaturate.desc: Deepens or washes out colors. 100% is natural, 0% is B&W.

photoRotation.name: Tilt Axis [rad]
photoRotation.desc: Slow rotation of the background media for a floating sensation.

photoContrast.name: Contrast Mod [%]
photoContrast.desc: Digital contrast boost. High values (>200) create a high-fashion, high-energy look.

particleChaos.name: Brownian Force
particleChaos.desc: Random force applied to particle movement.

particleColorSpeed.name: Hue Pulse
particleColorSpeed.desc: Speed at which particles cycle through the palette colors.

particleRotation.name: Geometry Spin
particleRotation.desc: Rotation of shapes like squares and triangles.

particleGravity.name: Gravity Y-Pull
particleGravity.desc: Simulates weight pulling particles up or down.

particleWind.name: Atmospheric Wind
particleWind.desc: A global force that causes all particles to drift collectively. Best mapped to overall song energy.

particleBreezeStrength.name: Organic Breeze
particleBreezeStrength.desc: The intensity of the collective rhythmic swaying of particles.

textScale.name: Typography Zoom [x]
textScale.desc: Size multiplier for the lyric text.

textBlur.name: Atmosphere Fog [px]
textBlur.desc: Blur applied to text for a cinematic, hazy glow.

textHoldTime.name: Text Duration [s]
textHoldTime.desc: How long each word stays on screen.

textTypeSpeed.name: Typewriter Speed
textTypeSpeed.desc: Milliseconds delay between characters for the nostalgic typewriter effect.

textEnvironmentDrift.name: Atmospheric Breeze
textEnvironmentDrift.desc: How much the text sways in the collective rhythmic drift.

textInkResolve.name: Ink Resolve Speed
textInkResolve.desc: How quickly the text "soaks" into existence during its resolve animation.

analogDrift.name: RGB Ghosting [px]
analogDrift.desc: Offsets Color Channels for a nostalgic double-vision effect.

analogScanlines.name: CRT Scanlines
analogScanlines.desc: Simulates old TV hardware by drawing horizontal bars across the entire image.

analogNoise.name: Film Grain
analogNoise.desc: Adds digital noise for a cinematic, film-like texture.

analogWarmth.name: Mediterranean Glow
analogWarmth.desc: Applies a sunset-inspired warm color wash specifically tailored for Agost projections.

analogLightLeak.name: Sun Flare Leaks
analogLightLeak.desc: Simulates light leaking into a film camera lens.

analogVignette.name: Vignette Darkening
analogVignette.desc: Darkens the corners of the screen to draw focus to the center.

opticsFocusPull.name: Depth of Field
opticsFocusPull.desc: Gaussian blur simulating camera bokeh. Blurry during quiet ambiance, snaps sharp during loud hits.

analogInkBleed.name: Ink Spread Speed
analogInkBleed.desc: Controls how fast ink spreads across the fibers. High values create a "soaked" watercolor look.

analogPaperGrain.name: Paper Fiber Detail
analogPaperGrain.desc: Intensifies the procedural paper texture detail.

analogStainIntensity.name: Vintage Stains
analogStainIntensity.desc: Adds subtle organic coffee/ink stains to the paper corners.

webglSpeed.name: Grid Speed
webglSpeed.desc: Forward scrolling speed of the 3D Cyber Grid.

webglElevation.name: Floor Elevation
webglElevation.desc: Camera height above the infinite 3D plane.

webglGlow.name: Grid Glow
webglGlow.desc: Intensity and thickness of the neon grid lines.

webglDistortion.name: Bass Distortion
webglDistortion.desc: How violently the grid bumps and warps to the audio.

panotScale.name: Panot Tiling
panotScale.desc: The number of flower tiles across the screen.

panotBloom.name: Panot Bloom
panotBloom.desc: Music-reactive light pulsing and sizing of the flower petals.

panotMortar.name: Panot Mortar
panotMortar.desc: Thickness of the grout lines between tiles.

panotShadow.name: Panot Depth
panotShadow.desc: 3D shadow depth for an embossed stone look.

horizonSpeed.name: Horizon Scroll
horizonSpeed.desc: Speed at which the background landscape drifts by.

gpuAberration.name: Chromatic Warp
gpuAberration.desc: Splits R, G, B channels radially outwards.

gpuSmearRatio.name: Fluid Density
gpuSmearRatio.desc: Amount of previous frames left on screen. 0 is none, 0.99 is infinite smearing trails.

gpuMeltSpeed.name: Gravity Drip
gpuMeltSpeed.desc: Pulls the smeared pixels downwards like dripping paint. Negative values drift up.

gpuKaleidoSegments.name: Kaleidoscope Slices
gpuKaleidoSegments.desc: Folds the screen geometry into Polar mirrored segments.

imgOpacity.name: Global Opacity
imgOpacity.desc: Transparency of the background media pool.

sensitivity.name: Mic Sens. [x]
sensitivity.desc: Multiplies incoming audio energy. Higher values make the visualizer more reactive to quiet music.

trendRate.name: Trend Rate
trendRate.desc: Determines how fast the "Energy Trend" (0-1) updates. Low values create a smooth long-term average.

clearOpacity.name: Trail Persistence
clearOpacity.desc: Controls how much of the previous frame remains. 0 = Permanent trails, 1 = No trails.

waveCount.name: Emanation Rings
waveCount.desc: Number of circular waves expanding from the center.

waveSpeed.name: Wave Velocity
waveSpeed.desc: The speed at which rings expand. Negative values make rings collapse inward.

waveThickness.name: Stroke Width [px]
waveThickness.desc: Thickness of the circular wave outlines.

waveChaos.name: Distortion Field
waveChaos.desc: Adds Perlin-like noise distortion to the wave perimeter for an organic, liquid look.

waveOpacity.name: Global Opacity
waveOpacity.desc: Alpha transparency for the entire wave layer.

rayCount.name: Laser Beams
rayCount.desc: Number of light rays emanating from the center point.

raySpeed.name: Tunnel Rotation
raySpeed.desc: Rotation speed of the beam array.

rayThickness.name: Beam Width
rayThickness.desc: Width of each individual light ray.

rayCenterHole.name: Void Radius
rayCenterHole.desc: Creates a black circular "Eye" in the center where no rays are drawn.

rayChaos.name: Jitter Distortion
rayChaos.desc: Adds aggressive jitter to the beam position for a glitched, strobe-like effect.

rayOpacity.name: Optical Weight
rayOpacity.desc: Alpha transparency for the laser beams.

textBlur.desc: Blur applied to text for a cinematic, hazy glow.

textHoldTime.name: Text Duration [s]
textHoldTime.desc: How long each word stays on screen.

textTypeSpeed.name: Typewriter Speed
textTypeSpeed.desc: Milliseconds delay between characters for the nostalgic typewriter effect.

textEnvironmentDrift.name: Atmospheric Breeze
textEnvironmentDrift.desc: How much the text sways in the collective rhythmic drift.

textInkResolve.name: Ink Resolve Speed
textInkResolve.desc: How quickly the text "soaks" into existence during its resolve animation.

analogDrift.name: RGB Ghosting [px]
analogDrift.desc: Offsets Color Channels for a nostalgic double-vision effect.

analogScanlines.name: CRT Scanlines
analogScanlines.desc: Simulates old TV hardware by drawing horizontal bars across the entire image.

analogNoise.name: Film Grain
analogNoise.desc: Adds digital noise for a cinematic, film-like texture.

analogWarmth.name: Mediterranean Glow
analogWarmth.desc: Applies a sunset-inspired warm color wash specifically tailored for Agost projections.

analogLightLeak.name: Sun Flare Leaks
analogLightLeak.desc: Simulates light leaking into a film camera lens.

analogVignette.name: Vignette Darkening
analogVignette.desc: Darkens the corners of the screen to draw focus to the center.

opticsFocusPull.name: Depth of Field
opticsFocusPull.desc: Gaussian blur simulating camera bokeh. Blurry during quiet ambiance, snaps sharp during loud hits.

analogInkBleed.name: Ink Spread Speed
analogInkBleed.desc: Controls how fast ink spreads across the fibers. High values create a "soaked" watercolor look.

analogPaperGrain.name: Paper Fiber Detail
analogPaperGrain.desc: Intensifies the procedural paper texture detail.

analogStainIntensity.name: Vintage Stains
analogStainIntensity.desc: Adds subtle organic coffee/ink stains to the paper corners.

webglSpeed.name: Grid Speed
webglSpeed.desc: Forward scrolling speed of the 3D Cyber Grid.

webglElevation.name: Floor Elevation
webglElevation.desc: Camera height above the infinite 3D plane.

webglGlow.name: Grid Glow
webglGlow.desc: Intensity and thickness of the neon grid lines.

webglDistortion.name: Bass Distortion
webglDistortion.desc: How violently the grid bumps and warps to the audio.

panotScale.name: Panot Tiling
panotScale.desc: The number of flower tiles across the screen.

panotBloom.name: Panot Bloom
panotBloom.desc: Music-reactive light pulsing and sizing of the flower petals.

panotMortar.name: Panot Mortar
panotMortar.desc: Thickness of the grout lines between tiles.

panotShadow.name: Panot Depth
panotShadow.desc: 3D shadow depth for an embossed stone look.

horizonSpeed.name: Horizon Scroll
horizonSpeed.desc: Speed at which the background landscape drifts by.

gpuAberration.name: Chromatic Warp
gpuAberration.desc: Splits R, G, B channels radially outwards.

gpuSmearRatio.name: Fluid Density
gpuSmearRatio.desc: Amount of previous frames left on screen. 0 is none, 0.99 is infinite smearing trails.

gpuMeltSpeed.name: Gravity Drip
gpuMeltSpeed.desc: Pulls the smeared pixels downwards like dripping paint. Negative values drift up.

gpuKaleidoSegments.name: Kaleidoscope Slices
gpuKaleidoSegments.desc: Folds the screen geometry into Polar mirrored segments.

imgOpacity.name: Global Opacity
imgOpacity.desc: Transparency of the background media pool.

sensitivity.name: Mic Sens. [x]
sensitivity.desc: Multiplies incoming audio energy. Higher values make the visualizer more reactive to quiet music.

trendRate.name: Trend Rate
trendRate.desc: Determines how fast the "Energy Trend" (0-1) updates. Low values create a smooth long-term average.

clearOpacity.name: Trail Persistence
clearOpacity.desc: Controls how much of the previous frame remains. 0 = Permanent trails, 1 = No trails.

waveCount.name: Emanation Rings
waveCount.desc: Number of circular waves expanding from the center.

waveSpeed.name: Wave Velocity
waveSpeed.desc: The speed at which rings expand. Negative values make rings collapse inward.

waveThickness.name: Stroke Width [px]
waveThickness.desc: Thickness of the circular wave outlines.

waveChaos.name: Distortion Field
waveChaos.desc: Adds Perlin-like noise distortion to the wave perimeter for an organic, liquid look.

waveOpacity.name: Global Opacity
waveOpacity.desc: Alpha transparency for the entire wave layer.

rayCount.name: Laser Beams
rayCount.desc: Number of light rays emanating from the center point.

raySpeed.name: Tunnel Rotation
raySpeed.desc: Rotation speed of the beam array.

rayThickness.name: Beam Width
rayThickness.desc: Width of each individual light ray.

rayCenterHole.name: Void Radius
rayCenterHole.desc: Creates a black circular "Eye" in the center where no rays are drawn.

rayChaos.name: Jitter Distortion
rayChaos.desc: Adds aggressive jitter to the beam position for a glitched, strobe-like effect.

rayOpacity.name: Optical Weight
rayOpacity.desc: Alpha transparency for the laser beams.

imgScale.name: Base Scale [x]
imgScale.desc: The zoom level of the background media. Values > 1 ensure Mediterranean artifacts fill the screen.

imgGlitch.name: Glitch Intensity
imgGlitch.desc: Randomized X/Y offset applied to the image based on music energy.

imgBlur.name: Optical Blur [px]
imgBlur.desc: Real-time gaussian-style blur applied to the media pool.

imgSaturate.name: Saturation [%]
imgSaturate.desc: Deepens or washes out colors. 100% is natural, 0% is B&W.

photoRotation.name: Tilt Axis [rad]
photoRotation.desc: Slow rotation of the background media for a floating sensation.

photoContrast.name: Contrast Mod [%]
photoContrast.desc: Digital contrast boost. High values (>200) create a high-fashion, high-energy look.

particleChaos.name: Brownian Force
particleChaos.desc: Random force applied to particle movement.

particleColorSpeed.name: Hue Pulse
particleColorSpeed.desc: Speed at which particles cycle through the palette colors.

particleRotation.name: Geometry Spin
particleRotation.desc: Rotation of shapes like squares and triangles.

particleGravity.name: Gravity Y-Pull
particleGravity.desc: Simulates weight pulling particles up or down.

particleWind.name: Atmospheric Wind
particleWind.desc: A global force that causes all particles to drift collectively. Best mapped to overall song energy.

particleBreezeStrength.name: Organic Breeze
particleBreezeStrength.desc: The intensity of the collective rhythmic swaying of particles.

textScale.name: Typography Zoom [x]
textScale.desc: Size multiplier for the lyric text.

textBlur.name: Atmosphere Fog [px]
textBlur.desc: Blur applied to text for a cinematic, hazy glow.

textHoldTime.name: Text Duration [s]
textHoldTime.desc: How long each word stays on screen.

textTypeSpeed.name: Typewriter Speed
textTypeSpeed.desc: Milliseconds delay between characters for the nostalgic typewriter effect.

textEnvironmentDrift.name: Atmospheric Breeze
textEnvironmentDrift.desc: How much the text sways in the collective rhythmic drift.

textInkResolve.name: Ink Resolve Speed
textInkResolve.desc: How quickly the text "soaks" into existence during its resolve animation.

analogDrift.name: RGB Ghosting [px]
analogDrift.desc: Offsets Color Channels for a nostalgic double-vision effect.

analogScanlines.desc: Simulates old TV hardware by drawing horizontal bars across the entire image.

analogWarmth.desc: Applies a sunset-inspired warm color wash specifically tailored for Agost projections.

analogLightLeak.name: Sun Flare Leaks
analogLightLeak.desc: Simulates light leaking into a film camera lens.

analogVignette.desc: Darkens the corners of the screen to draw focus to the center.

opticsFocusPull.desc: Gaussian blur simulating camera bokeh. Blurry during quiet ambiance, snaps sharp during loud hits.

analogInkBleed.name: Ink Spread Speed
analogInkBleed.desc: Controls how fast ink spreads across the fibers. High values create a "soaked" watercolor look.

analogPaperGrain.name: Paper Fiber Detail
analogPaperGrain.desc: Intensifies the procedural paper texture detail.

analogStainIntensity.name: Vintage Stains
analogStainIntensity.desc: Adds subtle organic coffee/ink stains to the paper corners.

webglSpeed.desc: Forward scrolling speed of the 3D Cyber Grid.

webglElevation.name: Floor Elevation
webglElevation.desc: Camera height above the infinite 3D plane.

webglGlow.name: Grid Glow
webglGlow.desc: Intensity and thickness of the neon grid lines.

webglDistortion.name: Bass Distortion
webglDistortion.desc: How violently the grid bumps and warps to the audio.

panotBloom.name: Panot Bloom
panotBloom.desc: Music-reactive light pulsing and sizing of the flower petals.

panotMortar.name: Panot Mortar
panotMortar.desc: Thickness of the grout lines between tiles.

panotShadow.name: Panot Depth
panotShadow.desc: 3D shadow depth for an embossed stone look.

horizonSpeed.desc: Speed at which the background landscape drifts by.

gpuAberration.desc: Splits R, G, B channels radially outwards.

gpuMeltSpeed.desc: Pulls the smeared pixels downwards like dripping paint. Negative values drift up.

gpuKaleidoSegments.name: Kaleidoscope Slices
gpuKaleidoSegments.desc: Folds the screen geometry into Polar mirrored segments.

imgOpacity.desc: Transparency of the background media pool.
